meaning: n.埃兰(亚洲西南部一古国)
examples: The chief of the people; Parosh, Pahathmoab, Elam, Zatthu, bani.
Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Behold, I will break the bow of Elam, the chief of their might.
But it shall come to pass in the latter days, that I will bring again the captivity of Elam, saith the LORD.
Prior to rejoining CNN, Elam served as a weekend evening anchor and general assignment reporter for KNBC.
Elam may not even make it past the first day (Friday) of the 2013 NFL Draft.
